title: Pouvoirs chypriotes

pages.text:
ー ..-

REFUELIC CE CYPRUS

INTIL PORNS

I, Nicos A. Rolendis, Minister of Foreign

Affairs

of the Republic of Cyrus, do

hereby

euthorize ir. Charalembos Hadjipenayioton, Director- General of the Ministry of Finance, to negotiate and initial on behalf of the Government of the

Republic of Cyprus, the Financial Protocol between the Government of

the Republic of Cyprus and the

Government of the Republic of France.

In vitness wherecf, I have signed and sealed

these Presents at Nicosia, Cyprus, this 25th Day of

August, One Thousand Nine Hundred and Bighty.

N.A

(NICOS A.

ROLANDIS)

Minister of Foreign Affairs
